---
id: data-integrations-controller-get-userland-user-token
title: "Get an access token for a connected account"
description: "Fetches a valid OAuth access token for a user's connected account. WorkOS automatically handles token refresh, ensuring you always receive a valid, non-expired token."
sidebar_label: "Get an access token for a connected account"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/workos-api/workos
custom_edit_url: null
mask_credentials: false
---

import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get an access token for a connected account"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/data-integrations/{slug}/token"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Fetches a valid OAuth access token for a user's connected account. WorkOS automatically handles token refresh, ensuring you always receive a valid, non-expired token.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
